title: Extracting Key Metrics from Financial Reports
scenario:
Create a prompt that extracts key financial metrics (Revenue, Net Income, and Gross Margin) from a given financial report, assuming it's a yearly report with quarterly data. The output should be in a structured JSON format, with each quarter as a separate key. The prompt should be under 100 words and use a formal tone. The report will be in the same format as the following example:

Revenue: $100,000 (Q1)
Net Income: $20,000 (Q1)
Gross Margin: 30% (Q1)

Revenue: $120,000 (Q2)
Net Income: $25,000 (Q2)
Gross Margin: 35% (Q2)

...etc.

Assume there are 4 quarters of data.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt is under 100 words and uses a formal tone.
Check if the JSON syntax is valid and correctly formatted.
Check if the extracted metrics are accurately extracted from the given report, including the correct ordering of quarters.
